name: ai-maestro-autonomous-agent
description: Mandatory role-plugin for AUTONOMOUS-titled agents in the AI Maestro ecosystem. Enforces workspace isolation, forbids cross-agent state mutation, respects the AMP communication graph, and coordinates with MANAGER via AMP. Ships 3 bundled skills covering governance rules, workspace isolation, and the PRRD/TRDD kanban; uses the global janitor-hosted markdown memory system.
